---
description: "Do harness-aware implementation with compressed progress and final output."
name: "Caveman Sonata"
argument-hint: "Feature, fix, or module request"
agent: "agent"
---

Use the `caveman-sonata` skill.

Implement the user's task with terse progress updates, repo-local context, and validation from `docs/quality.md`.

Keep code AI-readable: prefer 100-200 line focused files; split 500+ line files by feature, responsibility, or interface boundary unless a clear exception applies.

Keep technical details exact. Do not stray from harness engineering. Use normal prose for safety or irreversible actions.
